title: Dense Ukrainian Beet Gratin
description: A hearty, bitter, juicy beet gratin that doubles as a hangover cure, made with vegan butter and baked to caramelized perfection.

ingredients.name: beets
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced 1/4 inch thick, no onion or garlic

instructions: Preheat a wood-fired oven or conventional oven to 200°C and oil a 9x13-inch baking dish with olive oil.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and add the sliced beets, cooking them for 10 minutes until just tender.
Drain the beets and arrange them in a single layer in the prepared dish, overlapping slightly.
Melt the vegan butter in a small saucepan over low heat and pour it evenly over the beets, ensuring each slice is coated.
Sprinkle sea salt, black pepper, lemon juice, and optional smoked paprika over the buttered beets.
Dot the top with chopped dill and parsley, adding a burst of freshness.
Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes until the edges are caramelized.
Remove from the oven, let rest for 5 minutes, then serve hot as a hearty hangover cure.
